PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER, SO YOUNG KIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, MANSON F. NORTH PAC CAPITAL, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $519.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,519.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE FROM 27-NOV- 94 [$445.26 ON DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT] AND STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT.
